00026 /*
00027  * Definitions having to do with the program tree
00028  */
00029 
00030 #ifndef _TREE_H_
00031 #define _TREE_H_
00032 
00033 #include "wrappers.h"
00034 
00035 #include "oobj.h"    /* for the definition of unicode */
00036 #include "typecodes.h"
00037 
00038 extern int   SkipSourceChecks;
00039 extern char *progname;
00040 extern ClassClass **binclasses;
00041 extern long nbinclasses, sizebinclasses;
00042 
00043 /* User specifiable attributes */
00044 #define ACC_PUBLIC            0x0001    /* visible to everyone */
00045 #define ACC_PRIVATE           0x0002    /* visible only to the defining class */
00046 #define ACC_PROTECTED         0x0004    /* visible to subclasses */
00047 #define ACC_STATIC            0x0008    /* instance variable is static */
00048 #define ACC_FINAL             0x0010    /* no further subclassing, overriding */
00049 #define ACC_SYNCHRONIZED      0x0020    /* wrap method call in monitor lock */
00050 #define ACC_SUPER             0x0020    /* funky handling of invokespecial */
00051 #define ACC_THREADSAFE        0x0040    /* can cache in registers */
00052 #define ACC_TRANSIENT         0x0080    /* not persistant */
00053 #define ACC_NATIVE            0x0100    /* implemented in C */
00054 #define ACC_INTERFACE         0x0200    /* class is an interface */
00055 #define ACC_ABSTRACT          0x0400    /* no definition provided */
00056 #define ACC_XXUNUSED1         0x0800    /*  */
00057 
00058 #define ACC_WRITTEN_FLAGS     0x0FFF    /* flags actually put in .class file */
00059 
00060 /* Other attributes */
00061 #define ACC_VALKNOWN          0x1000    /* constant with known value */
00062 #define ACC_DOCED             0x2000    /* documentation generated */
00063 #define ACC_MACHINE_COMPILED  0x4000    /* compiled to machine code */
00064 #define ACC_XXUNUSED3         0x8000    /*  */
00065 
00066 #define IsPrivate(access) (((access) & ACC_PRIVATE) != 0)
00067 #define IsPublic(access)  (((access) & ACC_PUBLIC) != 0)
00068 #define IsProtected(access)  (((access) & ACC_PROTECTED) != 0)
00069 
00070 char *addstr(char *s, char *buf, char *limit, char term);
00071 char *addhex(long n, char *buf, char *limit);
00072 char *adddec(long n, char *buf, char *limit);
00073 
00074 # undef DEBUG
00075 # undef STATS
00076 # define NOLOG
00077 
00078 #endif /* !_TREE_H_ */
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:28 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
